summary: Well-structured PowerShell solution with strong adherence to best practices throughout: Set-StrictMode, $ErrorActionPreference='Stop', explicit parameter types, proper -LiteralPath usage, least-privilege workflow permissions, pinned action refs (actions/checkout@v4), and correct shell: pwsh configuration. Excellent separation of concerns (module, CLI, test harness). Minor concerns: run-act-tests.ps1 uses regex-based workflow rewriting and hardcoded expected values (scenario definitions) that could be more robust; test assertions have repetitive patterns that could be factored into helpers. Fixture files referenced in scenarios but not provided in review materials—assume present elsewhere. Overall production-quality, shippable code.
